heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyV380(Developer: Macro-video Technologies Co.,Ltd.) respect your concerns about privacy.We pay great attention to our users’ privacy.Related information will be collected and adopted from you when using our products and services and we hope to give you a clear declaration through this that how we collect,use,store and protect these information and the way how to access,update,control and protect them when you enjoy our service.
This statement is closely related to our services,please make sure to read it carefully.1、
Collected information1.1

Information we needE.g.personal information will be needed when you register a new account,such as e-mail address,phone number which are to be saved under your account name or you may provide other information such as the third-party account and photo when you use our sharing by third party or logging functions.1.2

Log InformationWe will collect the information automatically and saved it to server log or written them into phones’ outer saving devices,such as:Error produced or abnormity when using appbreakdown occurs when processing,we will put the wrong logs into outer saving device and users could choose whether to send it out to us or not.
Local-storageUser’s screenshot or recording files will be stored in phones’ outer saving devices.
Data cache and users’ data will be stored in Database for local storage when processing.

heading_content_part: Types of personal information collected by Jiguang Push SDK:

Device information:(1)Device identifier (IMEI, IDFA, Android ID, MAC, OAID ,IMSI and other related information)(2)application information (application crash information, notification switch status, software list and other related information)(3)device parameters and system Information (device type, device model,operating system and hardware related information)

decoder_heading: Types of personal information collected by BeiZi SDK
ident_heading: Types of personal information collected by BeiZi SDK
heading_content_part: As described below, we collect information from and about the computers, phones, connected TVs and other web-connected devices you use that integrate with our Products, and we combine this information across different devices you use. For example, we use information collected about your use of our Products on your phone to better personalize the content (including ads) or features you see when you use our Products on another device, such as your laptop or tablet, or to measure whether you took an action in response to an ad we showed you on your phone on a different device.

decoder_heading: Types of personal information collected by BeiZi SDK
ident_heading: Types of personal information collected by BeiZi SDK

heading_content_part: Device attributes:information such as the operating system, hardware and software versions, battery level, signal strength, available storage space, browser type, app and file names and types, and plugins.(2)

Device operations:information about operations and behaviors performed on the device, such as whether a window is foregrounded or backgrounded, or mouse movements (which can help distinguish humans from bots).(3)

Identifiers:unique identifiers, device IDs, and other identifiers, such as from games, apps or accounts you use, and Family Device IDs (or other identifiers unique to Facebook Company Products associated with the same device or account).(4)
Device signals:Bluetooth signals, and information about nearby Wi-Fi access points, beacons, and cell towers.
Data from device settings: information you allow us to receive through device settings you turn on, such as access to your GPS location, camera or photos.(5)

Network and connections:information such as the name of your mobile operator or ISP, language, time zone, mobile phone number, IP address, connection speed and, in some cases, information about other devices that are nearby or on your network, so we can do things like help you stream a video from your phone to your TV.(6)

Cookie data:data from cookies stored on your device, including cookie IDs and settings. Learn more about how we use cookies in the Facebook Cookies Policy and Instagram Cookies Policy.(7)Identifiers:unique identifiers, device IDs, and other identifiers, such as from games, apps or accounts you use, and Family Device IDs (or other identifiers unique to Facebook Company Products associated with the same device or account).(8)Device signals:
